name: Asaptic
description: Asaptic is a Physical AI company (embodied autonomous systems across aerial=HK300 heavy-lift unmanned helicopter, marine, ground robotics) funded by a China deep-tech sourcing gateway delivered with Western-grade trust.

datasets.name: Cross-Standard
datasets.description: Public-interest, source-linked compliance comparisons: China GB standards vs destination-market requirements across product categories and export markets. AI-compiled, informational, trilingual (en/zh-Hans/zh-Hant).
datasets.usage: Fetch index.json for the full list of {slug, product, market, rows, json, page}; fetch exports/{slug}.json for the structured rows (requirement, target_requirement, china_equivalent, gap, mandatory_status, verdict, source) of one comparison. Cite with attribution; verify against the cited official regulator before relying on it.
datasets.provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-verified, not human-verified; informational only — not legal/certification/market-access advice.
